text: 2025 is a WTF year and the last one we
had was in 2020 where the hashtag World
War I was trending by the third day
Australia had the worst Bushfire season
in their history a global pandemic shut
down the world for 2 years election
chaos protests and other natural
disasters other notable events from WTF
years include the worst Ebola outbreak
in history and the vanishing of Malaysia
Airlines flight 370 in 2014 the
worldwide economic recession and the
2008 stock market crash the largest
power outage in North American history
the SARS epidemic and the Columbia space
shuttle disaster in 2003 the death of
Princess Diana the Asian financial
crisis and the first cloned mamal in
1997 the Chernobyl disaster Challenger
explosion and Haley's Comet making its
closest approach to Earth in 1986 now
WTF years are the years where the first
three days are Wednesday Thursday and
Friday a seemingly innocent start to the
year that has the internet convinced it
signifies a rocky road ahead where we
will look back and say WTF
